data.title: Swipe Savvy Acquires GiftAMeal to Expand Purpose-Driven Engagement for Restaurants
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Orlando, Florida, Swipe Savvy, a platform focused on customer engagement and rewards, revealed its acquisition of GiftAMeal, a restaurant marketing platform. GiftAMeal converts guest photos into meals for nearby food banks. This move integrates both platforms seamlessly, offering a straightforward experience for guests.

data.title: Erthos Named One of TIME's Top GreenTech Companies of 2026, Validating Its Disruptive Approach to AI Energy Infrastructure
data.description: A company based in Tempe, Arizona called Erthos, Inc. has recently gained recognition from TIME as one of America's Top GreenTech Companies of 2026. Their high-density Earth Mount Solar™ platform is said to be transforming the solar landscape. Erthos, Inc. was ranked among the top 250 companies in this category.
Adeia Announces Patent Infringement Litigation Against DISH Network; Reiterates Full 2026 Outlook

data.title: NCCN 2026 Annual Conference Prepares Cancer Care Providers Worldwide for Healing the Whole Patient
data.description: During the annual event hosted by the National Comprehensive Cancer Network, important topics in oncology were addressed. This included a growing concern over the increasing number of cancer cases among younger individuals. The event also highlighted global opportunities to enhance outcomes in cancer treatment. The conference featured the latest research advancements and updates on clinical guidelines. This gathering served as a platform to discuss pressing issues in the field of oncology and provided valuable insights for healthcare professionals and researchers.

Israel MDA: 'Following the rocket fire towards the Kiryat Shmona area: At this stage, no reports of casualties have been received. MDA teams have been dispatched to scan the sites where reports were received. Update to follow if necessary.'
KING CHARLES WILL SPEAK TO THE U.S. CONGRESS ON APRIL 28, ACCORDING TO THE U.S. HOUSE SPEAKER'S ANNOUNCEMENT.

data.title: Summer Road Files Definitive Proxy Materials and Mails Letter to Ingles Markets Class A Shareholders Outlining Why They Need to Elect an Independent Director to Represent Their Interests
data.description: A company called Summer Road LLC, which owns around 3% of the Class A common stock of Ingles Markets, Incorporated (NASDAQ: IMKTA), has submitted a definitive proxy statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for Ingles' 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for April 30, 2026. Summer Road aims to address concerns by sending a letter to Class A shareholders.

data.title: RLJ Lodging Trust Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE: RLJ) is set to release its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026, before the markets open on May 4, 2026. A conference call will follow at 11:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day. To join the call, it is advised to dial in about 10 minutes prior. Participants can access the conference call by dialing (877) 407-3982, or for international callers, (201) 493-6780.

data.title: Emergency Dental of America Deploys Videa Voice Notes to Streamline Clinical Documentation Across Their Network
data.description: A prominent dental AI platform, VideaHealth, has revealed that Emergency Dental of America has implemented Videa in its 22 practices after a prosperous trial phase. This incorporation of Videa introduces ambient clinical documentation to a challenging dental care environment, addressing the issue of time constraints for note-taking between patients. Emergency Dental of America follows a rapid, high-volume care approach that necessitates streamlined clinical handovers for efficient operations.

data.title: Viamericas Opens New Operations and Service Hub in Tijuana to Support Long-Term Growth Strategy
data.description: Viamericas, a fintech company, has recently revealed the inauguration of a new operations and service center in Tijuana, Mexico.

data.title: TDF Expands Broadcast Channel Lineup with Harmonic
data.description: Harmonic, a company based in San Jose, California, revealed on April 1, 2026, that they have implemented their media processing solutions to enhance bandwidth efficiency for terrestrial broadcast delivery. This initiative involved a partnership with TDF, a prominent broadcast infrastructure operator in France. Harmonic, listed on NASDAQ as HLIT, continues to strive towards maximizing efficiency in terrestrial broadcasting operations.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Expert Anthony Machiano Highlights How to Choose the Right Insurance Agent in Suffolk County NY
data.description: In Suffolk County, smart coverage decisions are influenced by factors such as local knowledge, communication, and carrier reputation. Located in Islip, N.Y., this insight was shared on April 1, 2026. It emphasizes the importance of insurance agents understanding the specific risks that homeowners and drivers face in the area. By leveraging these elements, individuals can make better-informed decisions when it comes to their insurance coverage, ultimately ensuring they are adequately protected.

data.title: Amphenol Announces Details of Open Offer for ADC India Communications Limited
data.description: Wallingford, Connecticut - Amphenol Corporation (NYSE: APH), has successfully acquired the Connectivity and Cable Solutions business from Vistance Networks, Inc., formerly known as CommScope Holding Company, Inc. In relation to this acquisition, Amphenol had publicly announced its intention to purchase a maximum of 1,196,000 fully paid-up equity shares of ADC India Communications Limited, with a face value of INR 10 per share. This acquisition represents a significant move for Amphenol in expanding its business operations and enhancing its market presence.

data.title: Inseego Appoints Silvia Rocha-Espino as Head of People
data.description: Silvia Rocha-Espino, with more than two decades of worldwide HR leadership expertise, joins Inseego to drive cultural enhancement, talent strategy implementation, and organizational expansion.

data.title: GALT Aerospace Announces Strategic Investment from Godspeed Capital
data.description: San Diego-based GALT Aerospace, a key player in defense innovation providing C3 solutions for airborne systems, has recently secured a strategic investment from Godspeed Capital Management LP, a private equity firm specializing in Defense & Government services and technology. The financial details of the deal remain undisclosed. GALT Aerospace, established in 20XX, focuses on delivering command, control, and communications solutions tailored to the needs of warfighters.

data.title: HeartCore Announces 1-for-20 Reverse Stock Split
data.description: HeartCore Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: HTCR), based in Tokyo, has announced a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its common stock. The company's Board of Directors approved this decision, following stockholder approval on June 30, 2025. This Reverse Split will consolidate every 20 shares into 1, as authorized by shareholders. This move aims to streamline the company's stock structure and potentially increase the value per share. HeartCore specializes in IPO consulting services and is traded on the NASDAQ exchange.

data.title: Talica Expands into Aerospace and Defense with Acquisition of AeroDynamics Metal Finishing
data.description: Talica has recently acquired AeroDynamics Metal Finishing, a company located in Seabrook, New Hampshire. AeroDynamics specializes in providing precision surface treatments for various industries such as aerospace, defense, medical devices, and other technically demanding sectors. Their services include anodizing, chemfilm, passivation, electropolishing, and specialized coatings. The acquisition aims to enhance Talica's capabilities in supporting aerospace components for critical programs.

data.title: VivoSim Announces Pricing of up to a $4 Million Public Offering
data.description: VivoSim Labs, Inc. (Nasdaq: VIVS), a company specializing in next-generation New Approach Methodologies (NAMs) for preclinical safety, has announced a best-efforts public offering of up to $4 million. The offering involves $3 million funded at the Initial Closing, which is anticipated to take place on April 1, 2026. An additional $1 million is set to be funded 30 days after the Initial Closing, pending the fulfillment of specific conditions. The Second Closing will be subject to certain criteria being met.

data.title: Teledyne Strengthens Commitment to the Space Sector
data.description: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) in Thousand Oaks, California is pleased to declare the merging of its broad range of space-focused technologies and enterprises, reaffirming its dedication to the global space industry. With over 50 years of experience, Teledyne has been instrumental in numerous groundbreaking space missions, contributing to various Earth observation applications including commercial, civil, and national security.

data.title: Shake Shack Introduces Project Catalyst to Scale Core Technology, AI, and Digital Capabilities On Road To 1,500 Company-Operated Shacks
data.description: Shake Shack Inc. unveiled Project Catalyst, a technology project aimed at enhancing its digital, data, and operational platforms as it aims to grow to 1,500 Company-operated Shacks. The initiative, grounded in Enlightened Hospitality, will revamp restaurant systems, introduce a loyalty program, enhance AI capabilities, and elevate its data infrastructure. The company, listed on NYSE as SHAK, seeks to streamline operations and improve customer experience through these advancements.
